name: FNS Freya
desc: Named for the Norse goddess of fertility and struggle. The mission flagship, now deployed on Mairee, repurposed as the Freya Homestead. Contains FreyOps Central (FOX), Comms-Bay, Homestead Dome (assembly hall), Stasis Bay, storage locations, GRID operations, medical facilities, sports and entertainment, schools and daycare, mess halls, and residential hexagonal hab blocks.

name: FNS Brisinger
